overview: Titan T-Center provides testosterone replacement therapy (TRT) for men and hormone replacement therapy (HRT) for women, along with medical weight loss services. Initial evaluation includes a 30-minute blood test and assessment by a healthcare provider.
highlights: On-site accredited lab with same-day testosterone results
Walk-ins welcome with extended clinic hours
HRT available in both pellet and injectable forms
targetAudience: Men with low testosterone, women approaching or in menopause, and individuals seeking medically supervised weight loss.
